primary-default.$description: Transparent at rest — Primary variant adopts surface behind.

primary-active.$description: Promoted from INTERNAL. Depth step beyond hover. Needs designer confirm on canvas rebind.

secondary-default.$description: Transparent at rest — Secondary variant. Lever for an expressive/functional rest treatment.

secondary-hover.$description: Secondary hover lands on base — different from Primary, reflects variant axis.

secondary-active.$description: Promoted from INTERNAL. Same target as primary-active today; structural split preserved.

default.$description: Header label. Canvas-uniform across all variants/states. Disabled handled via opacity on parent.

disabled.$description: 25% opacity for disabled state, applied at variant parent frame. Matches chip/link/button precedent.
